ham.subject: Scheduled Anti‑Virus Patch Deployment – Nov 5, 2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

This is to inform you that all corporate endpoints will receive a mandatory anti‑virus patch as part of the November 2026 update cycle. The patch, version AV-5.1.2, includes enhanced ransomware protection and improved signature definitions. Deployment will begin at 22:00 UTC on 05 November and is expected to complete within 4 hours. Please ensure that your workstation is connected to the corporate network and that you have finished any critical work before 21:30 UTC.

If you encounter any issues post‑deployment, contact the IT Help Desk at helpdesk@corporate.com or raise a ticket through the Service Portal (<URL>). 

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Security Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Corporate Account Has Been Compromised!
spam.body:
Attention: 

Security Operations Center has detected an unauthorized login attempt on your corporate account from an unrecognized IP address. If this activity is not confirmed as legitimate, your access will be revoked within 24 hours to protect company data.

To verify your identity and restore full access, click the link below and confirm the requested information:

<URL>

Failure to comply will result in permanent suspension of your account. This message originates from the IT Security Department. Please do NOT forward this email.

Regards,
Security Operations Team
